message:
fix: parallelize benchmark fetching with bounded concurrency (#9448)

Replace serial experiment/run folder traversal with goroutines bounded
by a semaphore (8 concurrent workers). The per-request throttle() mutex
still serialises actual HTTP calls so the Drive API rate limit is
respected, but folder listings and file downloads now overlap instead of
waiting serially. Both the standard and SSE streaming paths benefit.

Fixes #9446

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
